data.title: 国际服两周年直播「2nd Anniversary Kivotos Live」
data.summary: [2nd Anniversary Kivotos Live Notice] Sensei, Blue Archive's 2nd Anniversary Live is coming real soo
data.body:
[2nd Anniversary Kivotos Live Notice]

Sensei, Blue Archive's 2nd Anniversary Live is coming real soon!
Be sure to check out the official notice below!

🗓️Schedule: 10/28 (Sat) 8:00 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2315276
